# Astray Verify v0.2.1

v0.2.1 is a polish release: a real GitHub Action, expanded
discoverability, and a few small optimizations that make the CLI easier
to embed in CI and monorepos.

## What's new

- **GitHub Action.** Use
  `TheAstrayDev/astray-verify@v0.2.1` to install the CLI inside any
  workflow, run any subcommand, and (on failure) automatically audit
  every fixture to surface the weakest link.
- **`--fixtures-dir` global override.** CI and the new Action can point
  at a custom fixtures directory without editing
  `astray.verify.json`.
- **Broader discoverability.** Expanded crate keywords (`ai-tools`,
  `mcp`, `model-context-protocol`, `testing`, `contract`, `cli`,
  `regression`, `snapshot`, `json-rpc`, `ci`) and the
  `development-tools::debugging` category.
- **Optimizations.** `load_config` and `ensure_project` now share the
  fixtures-directory override, removing duplicated lookups in
  `audit`, `config`, and `doctor`.

## Install

```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheAstrayDev/astray-verify/main/install.sh | sh
```

or

```bash
cargo install astray-verify --version 0.2.1
```

## Use in GitHub Actions

```yaml
- name: Verify MCP contracts
  uses: TheAstrayDev/astray-verify@v0.2.1
  with:
    command: test
    checks: tools,resources,prompts
    timeout-ms: 45000
    log-file: logs/astray-verify.jsonl
    audit-on-failure: "true"
```
